violations.text: The establishment does not employ a person certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food (Taquitos) is being prepared, handled, and/or served. There is to be a person certified in food safety on site at all times when time/temperature control for safety foods are being prepared/handled/served. Employees to be registered for Food Safety course/exam as soon as possible. - Hot Holding of any food items other than hot dogs is to be discontinued until multiple employees are certified in food safety to cover all times when food items may be hot held for customer service. (Employee removed taquitos from the hot hold roller rack at the time of inspection.) Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety, that is registered/licensed with the RIDOH Center for Food Protection. A full-time employee that is certified in food safety is to be registered with the RIDOH Center for Food Protection as soon as possible. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2026

Baked Goods/Pastry items and hot food items (taquitos and hot dogs) set for customer self-selection are lacking proper ingredient information. Food items removed from bulk and set for customer self-selection are to have labels available with the common name of the food and a list of ingredients/allergens for customer viewing. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2026

The following equipment was observed in need of repair or adjustment: - The doors to the Pepsi and Waters shelving of the walk-in cooler were observed to be in poor repair (not sealing properly/gaskets missing). Equipment is to be maintained in good repair. (Walk-In Cooler was observed to be maintaining proper ambient and food temperature at the time of inspection.) Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2026
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2026
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. Self-closing mechanism to be added to the door. New Violation. Correct By: 01/26/2026

The establishment does not employ a person certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. There is to be a person certified in food safety on site at all times when time/temperature control for safety foods are being prepared/handled/served. Employees to be registered for Food Safety course/exam as soon as possible. New Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety, that is registered/licensed with the RIDOH Center for Food Protection. A full-time employee that is certified in food safety is to be registered with the RIDOH Center for Food Protection as soon as possible. New Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2025

Dairy products in the walk-in cooler were observed held at 42-44 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Call was made for a service ticket for cooler cold holding adjustment at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2025

Baked Goods/Pastry items set for customer self-selection are lacking proper ingredient information. Food items removed from bulk and set for customer self-selection are to have labels available with the common name of the food and a list of ingredients/allergens for customer viewing. New Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2026

At the time of inspection, single use articles (bags) were observed being stored in the bathroom. Cleaned and SANITIZED EQUIPMENT, UTENSILS, laundered LINENS, and SINGLE-SERVICE and SINGLE-USE ARTICLES may not be stored in toilet rooms. Employee began moving single use items at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2026

The following equipment was observed in need of repair or adjustment: - The walk-in cooler was observed to be maintaining an ambient temperature of 42-43 degrees Fahrenheit with perishable foods observed held at 42-44 degrees Fahrenheit. (Call was made for a service ticket for cooler adjustments at time of inspection.) - The doors to the Pepsi and Waters shelving of the walk-in cooler were observed to be in poor repair (not sealing properly/gaskets missing). Equipment is to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2026
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2026
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. Self-closing mechanism to be added to the door. New Violation. Correct By: 01/26/2026

The establishment does not employ a person certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. There is to be a person certified in food safety on site at all times when time/temperature control for safety foods are being prepared/handled/served. New Violation. Correct By: 12/25/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety, that is registered/licensed with the RIDOH Center for Food Protection. A full-time employee that is certified in food safety is to be registered with the RIDOH Center for Food Protection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/25/2024

Baked Goods food items set for customer self-selection were observed to be lacking proper ingredient information. Food items removed from bulk and set for customer self-selection are to have labels available with the common name of the food and a list of ingredients/allergens for customer viewing. New Violation. Correct By: 12/25/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH Center for Food Protection at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2023
The floor in the walk-in area has an accumulation of water. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2023
